headings.strategy: Clean, tight tracking, high-contrast weights for premium feel.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Mobile-first native layout. Generous breathing room.

buttons.primary: w-full bg-[#1D4ED8] rounded-2xl py-4 px-6 flex-row items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: w-full bg-white rounded-2xl py-4 px-6 border border-[#E2E8F0] flex-row items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.accent: w-full bg-[#10B981] rounded-2xl py-4 px-6 flex-row items-center justify-center gap-2

inputs.default: w-full bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-4 text-[#0B1F3A]

trust_gauge.strategy: Use React Native Svg for a semi-circle gauge. Gradient stroke from Deep Blue to Emerald. Prominent score text in the center.

motion_and_interactions.splash: Fade In + Scale Up + Glow Effect on Logo
motion_and_interactions.tap_effect: Wrap buttons in TouchableOpacity with activeOpacity={0.8}

onboarding_community.description: 3D illustration of an elegant African community saving together.

onboarding_trust_score.description: 3D illustration of a glowing trust score gauge.

onboarding_certificate.description: 3D illustration of a beautiful floating financial certificate.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native application using NativeWind for styling. Build native screens, NO web container hacks (do not use max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen). Use standard NativeWind React Native classes (flex-1).
Implement an animated splash screen (Fade In + Scale Up + Glow) showing the Hodix logo and tagline 'Building Trust Together'.
Build the 6 onboarding slides using the provided 3D image assets. Use React Native Reanimated for swiping/transitioning.
Create bottom tab navigation using Expo Router or React Navigation with lucide-react-native icons.
The Trust Score UI should use react-native-svg for a semi-circle gauge visualization prominently colored with Emerald (#10B981) for positive scores, alongside risk category labels.
Financial Identity Profile should be styled like a premium certificate (deep blue background with gold/emerald accents, formal layout).
Use testID on ALL buttons, inputs, and clickable elements (e.g. testID='login-submit-button') instead of data-testid, as this is React Native.
